title: Delicious Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Algeria, perfect for a dinner gathering. This dish showcases the rich flavors of North Africa with tender chicken and a delicate sauce.

ingredients.name: Algerian tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at Middle Eastern or North African markets

instructions: Heat the oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend, olives, apricots, chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
Stir well to combine, then bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the tagine and cook over low heat for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
